title: Medical Coder
description: Novartis is seeking a Medical Coder for our Atlanta operations to support clinical trial documentation and biotech research operations. You'll code medical records from our research programs, ensuring accurate documentation that advances our mission to discover and develop innovative medicines. Join Novartis and contribute to life-changing treatments.
responsibilities: Review and code patient medical records from clinical research studies using ICD-10, CPT, and study-specific coding conventions
Verify source documents and coded data for completeness, accuracy, and regulatory compliance
Communicate with clinical staff and researchers regarding coding inconsistencies or documentation gaps
Maintain proficiency with study-specific coding manuals and protocol requirements
Support quality control audits of coded data to ensure compliance with FDA and regulatory guidelines
Track coding productivity metrics and participate in continuous improvement initiatives

requirements.education: High School diploma with completion of medical coding or health information technology program; Associate's degree preferred
skills: Knowledge of ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding systems
Understanding of medical terminology and anatomy
Attention to detail and accuracy in documentation review
Ability to work with electronic data capture systems
Strong organizational skills and ability to prioritize tasks
Commitment to regulatory compliance and quality standards
certifications: AAPC CPC (Certified Professional Coder) or AHIMA RHIT certification required or attainment within 12 months

benefits: Tuition reimbursement for coding certification programs
Employee wellness programs and fitness benefits
